step.title: Load architecture and threat model
step.action: Read docs/planning-artifacts/architecture.md and extract deployment requirements.
If threat-model exists, load it for security requirements context.

step.title: Design hosting and deployment
step.action: Select hosting platform and design deployment topology: regions, availability zones, container orchestration.

step.title: Design CI/CD pipeline
step.action: Design the CI/CD pipeline: build, test, stage, deploy stages with appropriate gates.

step.title: Plan scaling and autoscaling
step.action: Design horizontal and vertical scaling strategies with autoscaling triggers and limits.

step.title: Design monitoring and alerting
step.action: Design monitoring stack: metrics, logs, traces, dashboards, and alerting rules.

step.title: Estimate costs
step.action: Estimate monthly infrastructure costs across environments (dev, staging, production).

step.title: Produce infra design
step.template-output: Apply the template from template.md, filling all sections with infrastructure details.
